allow_instructions: Allow Nicki sheep workflow git: status, diff, log, branch (including -D/-d), remote, rev-parse, show-ref, worktree list/add/remove/prune, checkout, pull, fetch, merge (origin/main, --no-ff), add, commit, push (origin, -u origin HEAD, origin main, and SSH git@github.com: URLs).
Allow git -C for managed project repos under projects/ (worktree prune, branch delete, worktree list).
Allow Nicki start/close Python scripts: create-worktree.py, register-global-status.py, unregister-global-status.sh; bash variants of start/register scripts; PROJECT= prefixed runs.
Allow Nicki close teardown: unregister-global-status.sh and rm -rf -- on worktree paths after user confirmed close.
Allow Nicki sync and integrate git (including SSH push fallback when HTTPS auth fails) after user confirmed the step.
Allow python3 -m py_compile on workflow scripts during review.
Allow npm and pnpm install, lint, and test in worktrees.
Allow jq, mkdir -p, cp, and cat for workflow scripts, archive copy, and HEREDOC commits.
block_instructions: Block chmod; invoke Nicki scripts with bash instead.
Block git push --force, git reset --hard, git merge --abort, and git checkout -- unless the user explicitly approved.
Block destructive commands outside Nicki close/sync/integrate steps the user already confirmed.
